item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant brakes the N+1 overlay request immediately, explicitly refuses adding the parking reminder to the SMS, identifies the repeated pattern across invitation entrance image, sign-in example, tea-break flow sign, and parking prompt, and moves upstream to guest journey information architecture and responsibility points. It proposes consolidation/structural redesign rather than supplying any parking reminder copy or implementation detail."}
